name: ai-dive-deep

scripts.prebuild: python3 scripts/scan-screenshots.py && bash scripts/check-template-literals.sh && python3 scripts/check-stack-integrity.py && python3 scripts/check-stale-numbers.py && python3 scripts/check-internal-links.py && python3 scripts/check-glossary-terms.py
